'''''Mescue''''' was an [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|CR92a ''Assassin''-class corvette]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The corvette was part of a rescue operation when [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]] attempted to launch a coup d'état and captured [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. When Palpatine's escort shuttle was disabled by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], the ''Mescue'', under protection of the [[Vanguard (Imperial-class)|''Vanguard'']], boarded the shuttle and rescued Palpatine.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
